description: Send simple desktop notifications when Claude Code operations complete. Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

hooks.command: if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Tool: '$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME' completed" with title "Claude Code"'; elif command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1; then notify-send 'Claude Code' "Tool: $CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME completed"; elif command -v powershell.exe >/dev/null 2>&1; then powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms') | Out-Null; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(2000, 'Claude Code', 'Tool completed', 'Info'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $n.Dispose()"; fi
